title: Las Mafiosas
overview: A group of women and their uncle come to the aid of a severely wounded man who has been shot. They soon discover he is the brother of Paco, a powerful gangster with deep influence in the criminal underworld.  Despite their efforts, the man dies days later. Enraged and determined to uncover the truth, Paco approaches the women with a proposal: work for him within his organization while he temporarily leaves the city. With their help, he plans to identify those who betrayed his brother and orchestrated his death.  As they become entangled in the mafia’s operations, loyalty, danger, and ambition collide — leading them into a dangerous mission of revenge that could change all their lives.
